Herold

Suite SPA not yet built. From a clean checkout:

make build-web
make build

This runs pnpm -C web install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm -C web build, and copies the resulting web/apps/suite/dist/ into this binary's embedded FS. For development hot-reload without rebuilding the binary, set [server.webspa].suite_asset_dir in system.toml to a directory containing the freshly built suite assets.
